description: MIDDAG React UI -- Example PageContract API Endpoints. These static JSON files demonstrate the exact shape that Moodle and WordPress backends must produce to drive the @middag/react UI. Each file contains a complete PageContract (ADR-807) response with realistic mock data.

endpoints.summary: Books list -- stack layout with dense_table block (sortable columns, pagination, filters, row actions, bulk actions)
Admin dashboard -- dashboard layout with metric_card blocks + dense_table for recent activity
Product catalog -- stack layout with card_grid block using 'store' variant for WooCommerce-style products
Connector inspector -- sidebar preview panel for a single connector (Moodle, Open edX, Canvas, n8n)
Offering inspector -- sidebar preview panel for a single product/offering

requiredFields.shell: Built-in: basic, immersive, auth (Community) + product (Pro). Consumers may register custom shell keys.
requiredFields.page.title: Page heading displayed in the shell header
requiredFields.layout.template: One of: stack, sidebar, dashboard, wizard
requiredFields.layout.regions: Record<string, BlockDescriptor[]> -- region names depend on layout template
